spans.text: Didn't all your hair fall out because of the dye? It did! I bleached it and then when we were doing the cover shoot the guy was like, "You've got a little bit of breakage at the back" – and I was like, "So are you telling me I'm going bald?" I basically cut it into a boy's cut and then wore a wig.
